title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

International Registered Students

Announcements

Tuition Fee Payment Reminder

06
						January

2026

Dear Students,

According to university records, tuition fee payments were required to be fully completed by

December 31

.

Students who have

not yet completed their tuition fee payments

are kindly requested to arrange the payment as soon as possible.

Students who have

already completed their payments

are required to send the payment receipt, including their

full name and student ID number

, to the Finance Department.

Please note that if the payment is not reflected in the university system, this may result in

disruptions to academic and/or administrative procedures

.

For further information or inquiries, please contact the Finance Department via

maliislerbasvuru@okan.edu.tr

Best Regards

en

tr
